first_run.rationale: The scores are identical, and the reasoning across all sections (justification, strengths, concerns) is substantively the same. Both evaluations correctly identify the candidate's core skills gap: a lack of recent C++ experience and specific knowledge of industrial protocols (MQTT, IEC 62443), regardless of whether the experience was gained in Europe/North America or uniformly in the United States. The minor differences in wording are well within the bounds of normal run-to-run variation and do not reflect any change in the core assessment.
